intro: Brachychilum horsfieldii, also known as the Mountain Pepper Tree, is a native Australian plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments.
